payload.label: bed
payload.short_description: striped beige duvet on wooden frame
payload.long_description: A large mattress covered with a beige-and-gray striped duvet on a dark stained wooden bed frame; the bed fills the foreground, has a smooth made surface with a pillow visible at the upper-left, and is partially edge-cropped at the right and bottom of the crop — camera approx. 1.2 m from the bed.
